## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new `any` types without explanation
- [ ] No raw SQL without parameterisation
- [ ] Sanitizer applied to any new rendered HTML output
- [ ] Config flags use positive boolean names (e.g. `allow_x`, not `disable_x`)
